Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: bigpuritz
Message:
feat(docker): sync Docker Hub README on release

Add a dedicated Docker Hub README (docker/dockerhub-readme.md) with a
Quick Start section, compose snippet, configuration table, and links to
the full documentation. A new step in release.yml uses
peter-evans/dockerhub-description@v4 to upload the README to the
plugwerk/plugwerk-server repository on Docker Hub after the image push.

The README reflects the current docker-compose setup:
- Default PLUGWERK_STORAGE_ROOT (no override)
- Named plugwerk-artifacts volume mounted at /var/plugwerk/artifacts
- Short description, supported tags, multi-arch note
- Links to plugwerk.io for full documentation

Reuses the existing DOCKERHUB_USERNAME / DOCKERHUB_TOKEN secrets. The
token must have "Read, Write, Delete" scope (same scope already
required for the image push).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: mk-devtank42
Message:
fix(security): increase minimum password length from 8 to 12 characters (#151)

Update minimum password length to 12 characters per NIST SP 800-63B
recommendations for user-chosen passwords.

- OpenAPI spec: minLength 8 → 12 on ChangePasswordRequest.newPassword,
  UserCreateRequest.password, UserUpdateRequest.newPassword
- Frontend: update validation check and helper text in ChangePasswordPage
- Tests: update password fixtures to meet new 12-char minimum

Closes #151

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: mk-devtank42
Message:
fix(#44): validate baseUrl at startup to prevent SSRF/open-redirect

Rename AuthPropertiesValidator to PlugwerkPropertiesValidator and add
baseUrl validation. The server now rejects PLUGWERK_BASE_URL values at
startup that are not valid HTTP(S) URIs, preventing malformed or
malicious URLs from being embedded into plugins.json download links.

Validation checks:
- Must be a parseable java.net.URI
- Scheme must be http or https
- Host must be present
- No query string or fragment allowed
- No trailing slash

Closes #44

Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: mk-devtank42
Message:
fix(#31): remove plaintext passwords and insecure defaults from configuration

Replace hardcoded dev secrets in PlugwerkProperties and application.yml with
mandatory environment variables validated at startup via JSR-303 and a custom
blocklist validator. The server now refuses to start without PLUGWERK_JWT_SECRET,
PLUGWERK_ENCRYPTION_KEY, and PLUGWERK_AUTH_ADMIN_PASSWORD.

- Add @Validated + @NotBlank/@Size constraints to AuthProperties
- Create AuthPropertiesValidator to reject known insecure default values
- Remove fallback values from application.yml env var placeholders
- Add required env vars to docker-compose.yml with fail-fast syntax
- Update test profiles and add application.properties for test defaults
- Update CI workflow and smoke test script with required env vars
- Add .env.example template for quick onboarding
- Update README.md and CLAUDE.md documentation

Closes #31
